title: Add snapshot changelog generator UI
summary: Snapshot detail pages now include a changelog generator modal that lets users select snapshot changes, preview grouped release-note Markdown, save generated changelogs locally, and reopen past local changelogs.
userVisibleChange: Users can generate release notes from a snapshot page by choosing which snapshot changes to include, saving the generated changelog, and viewing past changelogs saved in this browser for the repository.

risks.title: Saved changelog history is browser-local for this version, so it is not shared across machines or users.

decisions.title: Generate UI changelogs from existing snapshot summaries and the same grouping rules as the CLI: Features, Improvements, Fixes, and Other.
Persist generated changelogs in browser localStorage scoped by repository so the feature is additive and does not change snapshot schema or repository storage.

validation.command: npm run build in ui passed
Playwright verified the snapshot Generate changelog modal, preview, save action, and past changelog history.
